params.name: workspaceId
params.description: The unique identifier of the workspace

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return per page

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

params.name: tags
params.description: Filter feature flags by tag names (comma-separated)

items.docs: Retrieves all feature flags within the specified workspace. Returns paginated results including flag name, description, traffic type, creation time, and tags.

params.name: workspaceId
params.description: The unique identifier of the workspace

params.name: trafficTypeId
params.description: The identifier or name of the traffic type for the feature flag

items.docs: Creates a new feature flag within the specified workspace and traffic type. The flag is created with default treatments of on and off. After creation, a definition must be created in each environment where the flag should be active.

params.name: workspaceId
params.description: The unique identifier of the workspace

params.name: featureFlagName
params.description: The name of the feature flag

items.docs: Retrieves a single feature flag by its name within the specified workspace. Returns the flag metadata including name, description, traffic type, creation time, and tags.

params.name: workspaceId
params.description: The unique identifier of the workspace

params.name: featureFlagName
params.description: The name of the feature flag

items.docs: Updates the metadata of an existing feature flag, such as its description or tags.

params.name: workspaceId
params.description: The unique identifier of the workspace

params.name: featureFlagName
params.description: The name of the feature flag

items.docs: Deletes a feature flag from the specified workspace. The flag must first have all its environment definitions removed before it can be deleted.

info.name: Get feature flag definition in environment

params.name: workspaceId
params.description: The unique identifier of the workspace

params.name: featureFlagName
params.description: The name of the feature flag

params.name: environmentId
params.description: The unique identifier or name of the environment

items.docs: Retrieves the full definition of a feature flag in a specific environment, including treatments, targeting rules, default treatment, percentage rollout configuration, and kill status.

info.name: Create feature flag definition in environment

params.name: workspaceId
params.description: The unique identifier of the workspace

params.name: featureFlagName
params.description: The name of the feature flag

params.name: environmentId
params.description: The unique identifier or name of the environment

items.docs: Creates a new definition for an existing feature flag in the specified environment. This activates the flag in that environment with the provided targeting rules and treatments.

info.name: Update feature flag definition in environment

params.name: workspaceId
params.description: The unique identifier of the workspace

params.name: featureFlagName
params.description: The name of the feature flag

params.name: environmentId
params.description: The unique identifier or name of the environment

items.docs: Partially updates the definition of a feature flag in a specific environment. Supports modifying targeting rules, percentage rollouts, default treatment, and kill status.

info.name: Delete feature flag definition in environment

params.name: workspaceId
params.description: The unique identifier of the workspace

params.name: featureFlagName
params.description: The name of the feature flag

params.name: environmentId
params.description: The unique identifier or name of the environment

items.docs: Removes the definition of a feature flag from the specified environment, effectively deactivating the flag in that environment.

info.name: List feature flag definitions in environment

params.name: workspaceId
params.description: The unique identifier of the workspace

params.name: environmentId
params.description: The unique identifier or name of the environment

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return per page

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination

items.docs: Retrieves all feature flag definitions within the specified environment and workspace. Returns the targeting configuration, treatments, and status of each flag.

params.name: workspaceId
params.description: The unique identifier of the workspace

params.name: featureFlagName
params.description: The name of the feature flag

params.name: environmentId
params.description: The unique identifier or name of the environment

items.docs: Kills a feature flag in the specified environment, forcing all evaluations to return the default treatment. This is used as an emergency shut-off mechanism.

params.name: workspaceId
params.description: The unique identifier of the workspace

params.name: featureFlagName
params.description: The name of the feature flag

params.name: environmentId
params.description: The unique identifier or name of the environment

items.docs: Restores a previously killed feature flag in the specified environment, resuming normal treatment evaluation based on targeting rules.
